# Inkognito
> Free online multiplayer drawing party game with hidden roles (Undercover / Mr White). Draw, bluff, unmask!

## Play
- [Play now](https://inkognito.fun): Start or join a game instantly in your browser
- [Français](https://inkognito.fun/?lang=fr): Jouer en français
- [English](https://inkognito.fun/?lang=en): Play in English
- [Español](https://inkognito.fun/?lang=es): Jugar en español
- [Português](https://inkognito.fun/?lang=pt): Jogar em português
- [Deutsch](https://inkognito.fun/?lang=de): Auf Deutsch spielen

## About
- Inkognito is a free browser-based multiplayer party game combining drawing and social deduction.
- Players draw a secret word simultaneously. The Undercover has a similar but different word. Mr White has no word at all.
- Compare drawings, find the impostor, and vote them out.
- 3-12 players, works on mobile, tablet, and desktop. No download required.
- Available in 5 languages with 300+ word pairs per language.

## Publisher
- [HiddenLab](https://hiddenlab.com)
